name: Avatar Explainer
description: Proof-driven news or tutorial master with HeyGen avatar, source receipts, UI micro-stories, beat-locked b-roll, karaoke captions, and a spoken CTA tail.
best_for: founder-style educational shorts on YouTube or LinkedIn

stages.title: Intake and source deck
actions: Confirm trend or claim with at least two sources
Build source deck with unique editorial jobs per asset

stages.title: Script and storyboard
actions: Write hook, avatar disclosure, news beat, story, proof, action, CTA tail
Map beats to Whisper sentence boundaries in storyboard.json

stages.title: HeyGen avatar render
actions: Render HeyGen with matched avatar and voice IDs
Trim duplicate script pass if detected

stages.title: Proof visuals and b-roll
actions: Record agent browser proof for source beats
Generate Ken Burns from real screenshots first
Run broll_layout_qc on every candidate visual

stages.title: FFmpeg master compose
actions: Encode beat segments, concat background track
Overlay borderless PiP, disclosure badge, karaoke ASS
Loudnorm master audio and mux final MP4

stages.title: QC and export
actions: Sample frames at every beat and vision-check overlays

qc_checks: outro card visible during spoken CTA
no b-roll loop inside long beats
compliance_notes: Bake synthetic presenter disclosure in avatar audio
Permanent disclosure footer on outro card
